structures.name: GithubEvent
structures.doc: GithubEvent: Structure for GitHub-side research ingestion.

definitions.name: githubPolicy
definitions.doc: Provider-specific cost policy for the Github compatibility shim.

definitions.name: toSourceEvent
definitions.doc: Convert a legacy Github event into the open provenance-source event surface.

definitions.name: githubInvariant
definitions.doc: Invariant: Github events are lawful if they are intended for the public record and target the research-stack repo.

definitions.name: githubCost
definitions.doc: Cost function: Measures the cost of public publication. Public visibility adds significant informational weight (Q16.16).

definitions.name: githubBind
definitions.doc: The Github Bind: Marks the idea as "in full view".
